mrr.label: MRR
mrr.tooltip: Monthly Recurring Revenue — sum of the normalized monthly value of all currently active subscriptions. Does not change with the date filter.

arr.label: ARR
arr.tooltip: Annual Recurring Revenue — annual projection of current recurring revenue. Calculated as MRR × 12.

subscribers.label: Subscribers
subscribers.tooltip: Total subscriptions with active or trial status at this moment. Current snapshot, not filtered by period.

arpu.label: ARPU
arpu.tooltip: Average Revenue Per User — MRR divided by the number of active subscribers. Indicates the average value each customer generates per month.

periodRevenue.label: Period Revenue
periodRevenue.subLabel: {count, plural, =1 {# purchase in period} other {# purchases in period}}
periodRevenue.tooltip: Sum of all payments received within the filtered period. Includes renewals and new subscriptions. This is the cash that actually came in.

renewals.label: Renewals
renewals.tooltip: Number of existing subscriptions (created before the period) that had a payment registered within the selected date filter.

nrr.label: NRR
nrr.tooltip: Net Revenue Retention — measures whether revenue from the existing base is growing. Above 100% means upgrades and expansion offset cancellations. Below 100% signals revenue loss.

churnRate.label: Churn Rate
churnRate.tooltip: Percentage of subscribers who canceled during the period relative to the active base. The lower, the healthier the retention.

revenueChurn.label: Revenue Churn
revenueChurn.tooltip: Percentage of MRR lost to cancellations in the period. Different from Churn Rate: a customer on an expensive plan canceling weighs more here.

mrrGrowth.label: MRR Growth
mrrGrowth.tooltip: Net MRR growth rate: (new MRR + expansion − churn − contraction) ÷ initial MRR. Positive = business growing.

ltv.label: Est. LTV
ltv.tooltip: Estimated Lifetime Value — average total value a subscriber generates throughout the relationship. Calculated as ARPU ÷ Churn Rate.

forecast.label: Forecast next 30 days
forecast.tooltip: Sum of the value of active subscriptions whose next billing date falls within the next 30 days. Useful for projecting short-term cash flow.
forecast.renewalsExpected: {count, plural, =1 {# renewal expected} other {# renewals expected}}

movementChart.title: MRR Movement
movementChart.subtitle: New, Renewals, Upgrades, Churn and Contraction by period
movementChart.emptyMessage: No recurrence data in the period

growthChart.title: MRR Evolution
growthChart.subtitle: Monthly recurring revenue growth in the period
growthChart.emptyMessage: No recurrence data in the period

subscriberFlow.title: Subscriber Flow
subscriberFlow.subtitle: New and renewals → Active Base → Cancellations and past due in the period
